---
title: "is_bijective_sphere_map"
generated: true
description: "Whether (vertices-on-sphere, faces) is a (near-)bijective spherical map."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.sphere`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:is_bijective_sphere_map -->
```python
is_bijective_sphere_map(vertices: Float[Array, 'n_vertices 3'], faces: Int[Array, 'n_faces 3'], *, flip_area_tol: float = 0.0, total_tol: float = 0.01) -> bool
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:is_bijective_sphere_map -->
Whether (vertices-on-sphere, faces) is a (near-)bijective spherical map.

`True` iff the signed solid angles ([`signed_spherical_areas`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere/signed_spherical_areas.qmd)) form
a **degree-1 cover** -- their sum is within `total_tol` of
$\pm 4\pi$ --
**and** the fraction of solid angle in triangles flipped against the
dominant orientation is `<= flip_area_tol`.  `flip_area_tol = 0` is the
strict fold-free test; a small tolerance (e.g. `8e-4`) mirrors the
FastSurfer/recon-surf quality gate, which tolerates a tiny flipped fraction.

Host-side boolean (a decision, not a traced value) -- used to gate the
spherical-parameterisation init fallback chain.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:is_bijective_sphere_map -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `vertices` | `Float` | `n_vertices` × `3` | — | The candidate spherical map. |
| `faces` | `Int` | `n_faces` × `3` | — | The candidate spherical map. |
| `flip_area_tol` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Maximum tolerated flipped solid-angle fraction (`0` = strict). |
| `total_tol` | `float` | — | `0.01` | Relative tolerance on `\|sum\| == 4 pi` (the cover test). |

**Returns** `bool`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:is_bijective_sphere_map -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `3` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_faces` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
